g.text: Signals move through a routing spine with observability and deterministic rule behavior.
Tip: click a node to open Live Trace on the right.
Click any node for Live Trace. Press "/" to search traces and errors.
Use Simulate to test rule changes without side effects.
Deterministic view of recent messages and routing decisions.
Deploys, connector health, auth changes, rule edits. Click to open the relevant trace or diff.
